metadata.title: Walking Confidence
metadata.description: Woman walks forward with hair bouncing, city life around

prompts.positive: The woman starts walking forward confidently, hair bouncing with each step, slight smile, city life moving around her, smooth forward walking motion

metadata.title: Office to Home
metadata.description: Woman arrives home and takes off blazer

prompts.positive: The woman arrives home, takes off her blazer while walking through the door, hangs it on a hook, relaxed expression, warm home interior lighting, smooth natural movement

metadata.title: Beach to City
metadata.description: Beach transitions to city street, outfit changes

prompts.positive: The woman walks forward confidently, the beach background gradually transitions to a modern city street, her outfit changes from beach wear to urban casual clothing, smooth cinematic transition, natural walking movement

metadata.title: Sportswear to Sleepwear
metadata.description: Changes from gym clothes to cozy pajamas

prompts.positive: The woman stretches her arms up, then pulls off her sports top revealing a soft cotton sleep camisole underneath, relaxes her shoulders, yawns gently, bedroom background fades in with warm lamp light, smooth cozy transition

metadata.title: Standing to Sitting
metadata.description: Woman gracefully sits down on chair

prompts.positive: The woman gracefully sits down on a nearby chair, crossing her legs elegantly, places her hands on her knee, settles into a relaxed comfortable seated pose, smooth natural body movement, same outfit same background

metadata.title: Sitting to Lying Down
metadata.description: Woman lies down from sitting position

prompts.positive: The woman slowly leans to the side and lies down on the couch, stretches her legs out, puts one arm behind her head, relaxed comfortable pose, smooth natural movement, same outfit, warm interior lighting

The woman flows through a yoga sequence, raising arms overhead into mountain pose, then slowly bending forward into forward fold, smooth graceful continuous movement, peaceful garden background, soft morning light

metadata.title: Hair Flip and Smile
metadata.description: Graceful hair flip then looks at camera smiling

prompts.positive: The woman flips her hair to one side with a graceful head movement, then looks directly at camera and gives a warm genuine smile, wind catches her hair gently, soft golden light illuminating her face, cinematic beauty shot

metadata.title: Poolside Entry
metadata.description: Woman sits at pool edge and dips feet in water

prompts.positive: The woman walks to the edge of the pool, sits down on the edge, dips her feet in the water creating small ripples, leans back on her hands enjoying the sun, smooth relaxed movement, crystal clear pool water, bright sunny day

metadata.title: Morning Coffee
metadata.description: Woman picks up coffee mug and sips it

prompts.positive: The woman reaches for a coffee mug on the kitchen counter, picks it up with both hands, brings it close to her face, takes a sip with closed eyes savoring the moment, opens eyes with a satisfied smile, warm kitchen morning light streaming through window
